info.title: md2pdf
info.description: Library for converting Markdown to PDF.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription:
Command-line application for converting Markdown to Pdf.
Note: setting any of the --toc options will cause a TOC to be generated within the placeholders.

arguments.name: input-path
arguments.description: The path to the markdown file to parse.

arguments.name: output-path
arguments.description: Path where the PDF file should be generated. If not set, defaults to <markdown-filename>.pdf.
